title: Knowledge Distillation: Teaching Small Models to Think Like Large Ones
subtitle: Compression without catastrophic loss — the science of soft labels and dark knowledge
description: Knowledge distillation compresses the intelligence of large teacher models into compact student networks — enabling accurate, efficient AI in resource-constrained scientific applications.
excerpt: Distillation is one of the most underrated techniques in modern ML. By training a compact student on a larger teacher's soft outputs, we preserve accuracy without the computational cost.
hero_caption: A large teacher network transferring structured probabilistic knowledge to a compact student model.
hero_aria: Teacher and student neural network diagram showing knowledge transfer
